title: Open LIRS Website
description: Navigate to the LIRS website to begin your tax return filing - https://etax.lirs.net/.

title: Login to Your Account
description: Click on Login and enter your credentials to access your account.

title: Go to Tax Returns Section
description: Click on “Returns” on the sidebar then select “My Tax Returns”.

title: Start Filing
description: Click on “File Returns Here” to begin your tax return process.

title: Enter Income Details
description: Fill in your income details and upload the required documents.

title: Go to Accommodation Section
description: Click Next to navigate to the Mandatory Disclosure of Accommodation section.

title: Enter Accommodation Details
description: Provide your accommodation details including address and rent information.

title: Add Additional Disclosures
description: If available, add details for Support Staff, Assets, or Other Disclosure for Reliefs

title: Review Your Information
description: Review all the information you have entered before submitting.

title: Submit Tax Return
description: Click Submit to complete your tax return filing.

title: Filing Successful
description: Congratulations! You have successfully filed your tax returns.
